benefits.description: Visceral fat loss; first cycle results were very positive, second cycle results seem slower

side_effects.description: Slight change in eyesight noticed during second cycle, believed to be a possible side effect of Tesamorelin

protocol_notes: Second cycle; first cycle was over 6 months ago. Considering switching to Sermorelin and CJC. Protocol calls for a gap between cycles. Cost and the 2mg/day dose are noted as challenges.
